name: Salsa Puttanesca
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a heavy medium-size saucepan.
2. Add the garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
3. Add the tomatoes, capers, and olives to the pan.
4. Stir and heat over medium until just simmering.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Calories: 78
Carbs: 5 G
Protein: 1 G
Cholesterol: 0 MG
Fat: 6 G/68%
